summary: FULLY_IMPLEMENTED. HEAD equals origin/main. Merge 3b4f7c166 (PR #3289) explicitly completes MoonLadderStudios/MoonMind#3277 and adds the missing ContainerJob Temporal test-server/replay evidence and controlling lifecycle tests described by the trusted brief. No new code work is needed.

requirements.description: Provide the versioned MoonMind.ContainerJob workflow with stable asynchronous start-or-attach identity, compact contracts, typed Activity boundaries, existing-fleet registration, deterministic ownership/publication tokens, timeout and cancellation finalization, monotonic projection sequencing, and separation of primary outcome from publication/cleanup diagnostics.
Provide ContainerJob Temporal test-server workflow-boundary and replay tests.
Provide controlling tests for cancellation during acquisition, running, and publication.
Provide controlling tests for timeout stop, evidence publication, and cleanup behavior.
